subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of God's love! The wings of the peacock have spread in the realm of Paradise, and a cry hath resounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انتشا من سلاف محبه الله قد انتشرت اجنحه الطاوس فی قطب الفردوس و نعب
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @symbolism
